backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data models (Client, Intervention, UserProfile, MediaItem) and CRUD methods for clients, interventions, user profiles, and media, with role-based access control via Auth mixin and blob storage support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the full application rebuild feature to its associated frontend source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, hook, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with French locale, viewport meta tags, manifest/icon links, Apple PWA meta tags, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web app manifest for 'Vial Traite Service' defining app name, icons, display mode, theme colors, and version.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy for static assets while always fetching navigation requests from the network, with old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with authenticated/unauthenticated routes, QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, ErrorBoundary, and a profile setup dialog for new users.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for the admin unlock dialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook. The dialog cannot be dismissed until the profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: A panel component that displays and manages a client's blacklist status, allowing users to add a client to the blacklist with comments/media or remove them via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: A dialog form for creating a new client with fields for name, address, phone, and email, using the `useCreateClient` hook to persist the data.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: A dialog form pre-populated with an existing client's data that allows editing their name, address, phone, and email via the `useUpdateClient` hook.
A wrapper around the UI `Badge` component that adds custom color variants for `success`, `warning`, and `pending` states.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a styled error card with options to retry, reload, and copy error details to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: A dialog that lets users choose between JSON and PDF export formats and triggers a data export via the `useDataExport` hook, showing a progress bar during export.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to `/login` and shows a loading spinner while authentication state is being initialized.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: A dialog component for creating a new intervention, with date (day/month/year), comments, and media fields, using the useAddIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: A dialog component for editing an existing intervention's date, comments, and media, pre-populated with the intervention's current data and using the useUpdateIntervention mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: A read-only dialog that displays the date, comments, and media of a single intervention, with a formatted date helper and clickable media preview.
Displays a list of interventions for a given client with loading/error states, and provides inline actions for viewing details, editing, and deleting each intervention.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: The main mobile app shell with a sticky header (logo, export, logout), a bottom navigation bar for Clients/Dashboard/Technical Folder routes, and a connectivity status bar.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: A simple file input button component that triggers a hidden file input and calls an onSelect callback with the chosen files.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: A media management component that allows users to add files via file picker or camera capture, displays thumbnails of selected ExternalBlob items, and supports removal of individual items.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Renders a grid of thumbnail images from an array of ExternalBlob objects, with optional click-to-open support via a DocumentViewer dialog.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Displays a status bar when offline or when there are pending sync operations, with a button to trigger manual synchronization.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Dialog component for creating a new folder at a given path, with validation that prevents slashes in the folder name.
Modal viewer for images, PDFs, and videos with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, download, and pinch-to-zoom touch support.
Returns an appropriate Lucide icon component based on a file's extension (image, PDF, video, document, spreadsheet, or generic file).
Dialog for moving a file to a different folder, featuring breadcrumb navigation built from the existing file tree.
Dialog component for renaming a folder, validating that the new name is non-empty, slash-free, and different from the current name.
Row component for a technical file entry with actions to view (DocumentViewer), move (MoveFolderDialog), and delete (with confirmation dialog).
A dialog component that allows users to upload files to a technical folder either by selecting a file from disk or capturing a photo via camera, with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUnlock.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides two React Query mutation hooks for marking and unmarking clients as blacklisted via the backend actor, with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, creating, and updating clients via the backend actor, with cache invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Provides hooks to fetch the current caller's user profile and save it via the backend actor, with React Query caching and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: A hook that exports all application data (clients, interventions, technical files) as a JSON or plain-text file download, with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting client interventions via the backend actor, with cache invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: React hook that tracks the browser's online/offline status by listening to window events and returns a boolean.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: React hook that manages syncing pending offline outbox operations to the backend when the app comes online, exposing sync state and controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on technical files and folders, including list, upload, delete, move, create, and rename.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the app's light/dark theme using brand colors, plus safe-area utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB abstraction layer providing get/set operations for an outbox store (pending operations) and a cache store for offline support.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: Outbox queue module that wraps the IndexedDB layer to enqueue, retrieve, and remove pending offline operations.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Sync engine that processes queued outbox operations and replays them against the backend actor, handling known operation types like addIntervention and createOrUpdateClient.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Page component displaying a single client's full dossier including contact info, blacklist status, interventions, and an edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Page component listing all clients with search functionality, blacklist badges, and navigation to individual client dossier pages.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a calendar and a list of interventions for the selected date, with loading/error states and a dialog for intervention details.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the home route upon successful login.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Technical folder page that builds and navigates a hierarchical folder tree from flat file paths, supporting folder creation, renaming, file upload, and breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the PWA service worker (sw.js) after the page load event with a short delay.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, existing features, and configuration for the Vial Traite Service application rebuild.
